papers.title: Prevalence and factors associated with tobacco and nicotine product use among adolescents in the Democratic Republic of the Congo: evidence from a cross-sectional national household survey
papers.translated_title: 刚果民主共和国青少年烟草和尼古丁产品使用的流行率及相关因素：来自一项横断面全国性家庭调查的证据
papers.author: Tchoupe, C.
papers.summary: Background: The initiation of tobacco and nicotine product use often occurs in adolescents. This necessitates monitoring of this behaviour in this population, particularly in countries such as the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) where approximately 58% of the population is under 19 years of age. Our study assessed the prevalence of, and factors associated with use in the DRC. Methods: We conducted a nationally representative, cross-sectional, household survey between March and May 2024 among adolescents aged 10 to 17 years. We estimated the prevalence of use of smoked and smokeless tobacco products, heated tobacco products, and nicotine products (i.e., electronic cigarettes and nicotine pouches). We used logistic regression to identify factors associated with current use of any tobacco product, smoked tobacco, and smokeless tobacco using adjusted odd ratios. All analyses included 95% confidence intervals (CI). Results: Of the 4,675 adolescents who completed the survey, the prevalence of current use of any tobacco or nicotine product was 11.87% (95% CI: 6.93-19.58). This was 7.98% (95% CI: 4.23-14.55) for smoked tobacco products, 5.86% (95% CI: 3.42-9.87) for smokeless tobacco products, 0.11% (95% CI: 0.11-0.11) for heated tobacco products and 0.60% (95% CI: 0.10-3.40) for nicotine products. Boys were more likely to use tobacco than girls. Being enrolled in school and having both parents alive were protective from tobacco use. Having a male household head, a household head education level of at least secondary school, and exposure to tobacco smoking in public places increased the odds of being a tobacco user. Conclusions: The DRC should strengthen policies that make tobacco and nicotine products less accessible or appealing to adolescents. This includes raising excise taxes; banning the sale of single cigarette sticks, small packets and flavoured products; and comprehensive smoke-free laws. Policies should account for factors that make adolescents more vulnerable product use.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：烟草和尼古丁产品的使用往往始于青少年时期。因此，有必要监测这一人群的使用行为，尤其是在刚果民主共和国（DRC）等约58%人口年龄在19岁以下的国家。我们的研究评估了刚果民主共和国青少年烟草和尼古丁产品的使用率及其相关因素。方法：我们于2024年3月至5月期间开展了一项具有全国代表性的横断面家庭调查，对象为10至17岁的青少年。我们估算了吸烟草、无烟烟草、加热烟草以及尼古丁产品（即电子烟和尼古丁袋）的使用率。采用逻辑回归分析，通过调整后的比值比（OR）确定当前使用任何烟草产品、吸烟草和无烟烟草的相关因素。所有分析均包含95%置信区间（CI）。结果：在完成调查的4,675名青少年中，当前使用任何烟草或尼古丁产品的比例为11.87%（95% CI: 6.93-19.58）。其中，吸烟草产品使用率为7.98%（95% CI: 4.23-14.55），无烟烟草产品为5.86%（95% CI: 3.42-9.87），加热烟草产品为0.11%（95% CI: 0.11-0.11），尼古丁产品为0.60%（95% CI: 0.10-3.40）。男孩使用烟草的可能性高于女孩。在校就读及父母双全对烟草使用具有保护作用。家庭户主为男性、户主教育程度至少为中学、以及在公共场所接触吸烟行为，均增加了成为烟草使用者的几率。结论：刚果民主共和国应加强政策，降低烟草和尼古丁产品对青少年的可及性和吸引力。这包括提高消费税；禁止销售单支香烟、小包装和调味产品；以及实施全面的无烟法律。政策制定应考虑使青少年更易受产品使用影响的因素。

papers.title: Evaluating the impact of a community-engagement intervention on the uptake of childhood vaccines in England: A synthetic control analysis
papers.translated_title: 评估英格兰社区参与干预措施对儿童疫苗接种率的影响：一项合成控制分析
papers.author: Amin, M. S.
papers.summary: Objective: To evaluate the impact of equity-focused community-engagement initiatives on the uptake of five routine childhood vaccinations. Design: Quasi-experimental study within a synthetic control analysis framework. Setting: Primary care in England between April 2019 and March 2025. Childhood vaccination data were obtained from the Cover of Vaccination Evaluated Rapidly (COVER) programme. Intervention: The Health Equity Liverpool Project (HELP) is a community-engagement vaccination initiative implemented between October 2023 and June 2024 across nine sites in central and north Liverpool. Activities were co-developed with local partners and delivered in neighbourhoods with persistently low childhood vaccine coverage. Intervention practices were defined as those located within 1 km of HELP delivery sites (n=19). A weighted combination of non-intervention practices across England (n=5826) was used to construct a synthetic control group. Main outcomes: Quarterly counts of vaccinated children following intervention implementation for first doses of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine (MMR1 at 24 months and at 5 years), second dose of MMR (MMR2 at 5 years), pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (PCV at 24 months), the 6-in-1 vaccine, covering diphtheria, tetanus, pertussis, polio, haemophilus influenzae type b, and hepatitis B (at 12 months), and the rotavirus vaccine (at 12 months). Results: Following HELP, rotavirus vaccine uptake increased by 10.03% (95% CI 0.37% to 24.63%), corresponding to 120 (95% CI 4 to 295) additional infants vaccinated in the intervention group compared to the synthetic control. Similarly, 6-in-1 vaccine uptake rose by 11.56% (95% CI 2.37% to 25.56% ~143 95% CI 29 to 317 additional children vaccinated. No statistically significant changes were observed for MMR1, MMR2, or PCV. Improvements were short-lived, with uptakes returning to pre-intervention levels after approximately nine months. Conclusions: Community-engagement vaccination interventions may produce a modest short-term improvement in uptake of selected early life vaccines but show limited evidence of benefit for MMR uptake. Our findings suggest that such approaches are unlikely to have a sustained impact without long-term investment, integration into existing immunisation systems and addressing the wider social determinants of health.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：评估以公平为核心的社区参与举措对五种常规儿童疫苗接种率的影响。设计：采用合成控制分析框架的准实验研究。背景：2019年4月至2025年3月期间的英格兰初级医疗服务。儿童疫苗接种数据来自疫苗接种覆盖率快速评估（COVER）项目。干预措施：利物浦健康公平项目（HELP）是一项社区参与疫苗接种倡议，于2023年10月至2024年6月在利物浦中部和北部的九个地点实施。活动与当地合作伙伴共同开发，并在儿童疫苗覆盖率持续偏低的社区开展。干预实践定义为位于HELP实施地点1公里范围内的机构（n=19）。使用英格兰非干预机构的加权组合（n=5826）构建合成对照组。主要结局：干预实施后，针对以下疫苗的季度接种儿童数量：麻疹、腮腺炎和风疹疫苗第一剂（MMR1，24个月和5岁时）、MMR第二剂（MMR2，5岁时）、肺炎球菌结合疫苗（PCV，24个月时）、六联疫苗（涵盖白喉、破伤风、百日咳、脊髓灰质炎、b型流感嗜血杆菌和乙型肝炎，12个月时）以及轮状病毒疫苗（12个月时）。结果：HELP实施后，轮状病毒疫苗接种率上升10.03%（95% CI 0.37%至24.63%），相当于干预组比合成对照组多接种120名婴儿（95% CI 4至295）。同样，六联疫苗接种率上升11.56%（95% CI 2.37%至25.56%），约多接种143名儿童（95% CI 29至317）。MMR1、MMR2或PCV未观察到统计学显著变化。改善效果短暂，约九个月后接种率恢复至干预前水平。结论：社区参与疫苗接种干预可能对特定早期疫苗的接种率产生适度短期改善，但对MMR接种率的益处证据有限。我们的研究结果表明，若无长期投入、融入现有免疫系统并解决更广泛的社会健康决定因素，此类方法不太可能产生持续影响。

papers.title: Perceptions of HPV Self-Collection for Cervical Cancer Screening Among Mobile Health Program Attendees
papers.translated_title: 移动健康项目参与者对HPV自采样用于宫颈癌筛查的看法
papers.author: Tovar, A.
papers.summary: Background: Mobile health programs (MHPs) provide essential preventive services to uninsured and underserved communities. Following the 2024 regulatory approval of human papillomavirus (HPV) self-collection for cervical cancer screening, MHPs represent an access point for healthcare-based self-collection. However, little is known about patient perceptions of this approach in MHP and other healthcare settings. Methods: From May to August 2025, we surveyed individuals aged 25 to 65 years with a cervix who attended MHPs in Southern Arizona. The survey assessed interest in HPV self-collection, preferred locations, instructional preferences, and facilitators to attend follow-up after a positive result. Descriptive statistics summarized demographic characteristics and survey responses. Results: Fifteen female participants completed the survey (mean age 36 years). Ten (67%) identified as Hispanic or Latino, nine (60%) preferred Spanish, and 14 (93%) were uninsured. Interest in HPV self-collection was high, with ten (67%) very or extremely interested. Among those interested, nine (69%) preferred home-based self-collection, and four (31%) preferred clinic or MHP-based self-collection. Most common concerns regarding self-collection on the MHP were ensuring privacy (n=7; 47%) and knowing how to perform the test correctly (n=5; 33%). Most participants (n=11; 73%) reported being very or extremely confident they would attend follow-up after a positive result; language-concordant support, reminder calls, and scheduling assistance were the most endorsed facilitators. Conclusion: HPV self-collection was highly acceptable among MHP attendees, although home-based self-collection was most preferred. Addressing privacy concerns, providing multiple modes of instruction, and offering navigation support may improve implementation success and ensure timely follow-up care in MHP settings.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：移动健康项目（MHPs）为无保险和医疗服务不足的社区提供基本预防服务。2024年人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）自我采样用于宫颈癌筛查获得监管批准后，MHPs成为基于医疗服务的自我采样接入点。然而，关于患者对MHP及其他医疗场景中该方法的认知，目前知之甚少。方法：2025年5月至8月，我们对亚利桑那州南部参加MHPs的25至65岁有宫颈的个体进行了调查。问卷评估了HPV自我采样的兴趣、首选地点、指导偏好以及阳性结果后随访的促进因素。描述性统计总结了人口学特征和调查结果。结果：15名女性参与者完成了调查（平均年龄36岁）。10人（67%）认定为西班牙裔或拉丁裔，9人（60%）偏好西班牙语，14人（93%）无保险。对HPV自我采样的兴趣较高，10人（67%）表示非常或极其感兴趣。在感兴趣者中，9人（69%）偏好居家自我采样，4人（31%）偏好诊所或MHP内自我采样。关于MHP自我采样的最常见顾虑是确保隐私（n=7；47%）和了解如何正确操作（n=5；33%）。大多数参与者（n=11；73%）报告对阳性结果后能坚持随访非常或极其有信心；语言匹配支持、提醒电话和预约协助是最受认可的促进因素。结论：HPV自我采样在MHP参与者中接受度很高，但居家自我采样最受青睐。解决隐私顾虑、提供多种指导方式以及提供导航支持，可能有助于提高实施成功率并确保MHP场景中的及时随访护理。

papers.title: Chyme reinfusion using the Insides System to reduce parenteral nutrition dependence in Type 2 intestinal failure: multicentre randomised controlled trial (REINFUSE)
papers.translated_title: 使用Insides系统进行食糜回输以减少2型肠衰竭患者对肠外营养依赖：多中心随机对照试验（REINFUSE）
papers.author: Milne, T.
papers.summary: Background Patients with type 2 intestinal failure (T2IF) due to double enterostomy or enterocutaneous fistula (DES/ECF) require parenteral nutrition (PN), carrying risks of catheter sepsis, venous thrombosis, and liver disease. Chyme reinfusion therapy (CRT) may reduce PN dependence but has not been evaluated in a randomised controlled trial (RCT). This study assessed whether device-assisted CRT using The Insides System reduces PN requirements. Methods: This multicentre, open-label RCT enrolled PN-dependent adults with T2IF due to DES/ECF across 12 centres in the UK and USA. Patients with insufficient distal limb length, proximal bowel obstruction, active sepsis, or severe hepatorenal failure were excluded. Participants were block randomised 2:1 to device-assisted CRT plus standard care (active) or standard care (control). The primary endpoint was 50% or greater reduction in PN caloric intake at 30 days, using an intention-to-treat analysis, for a comparison between randomised groups using a two tailed p-value of 0.025 to allow for a single interim analysis. Secondary outcomes were rate of PN cessation at 30 and 60 days, quality of life, and adverse events. Results: The population comprised 39 (26 active, 13 control) participants. At Day 30, 8/26 (31%) active participants achieved the primary endpoint versus no controls (p=0.035). By Day 60, 10/23 (43%) active participants had completely ceased PN versus no controls (p=0.008), with median intestinal losses reduced by 1,344 mL/day at Day 30 (p=0.005) and 1,450 mL/day at Day 60 (p=0.026 between group). Device-related adverse events were predominantly mild; one death unrelated to the device occurred. Conclusion: CRT with the Insides System demonstrated substantial therapeutic advantages in patients with T2IF from DES/ECF, with 31% of participants reducing PN calories by 50% at 30 days and >40% of participants achieving complete PN cessation by 60 days, and an acceptable safety profile. Trial registration: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04577456 Funding: This trial was sponsored by The Insides Company Ltd.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 因双造口或肠皮瘘（DES/ECF）导致的2型肠衰竭（T2IF）患者需依赖肠外营养（PN），存在导管败血症、静脉血栓及肝病风险。食糜回输疗法（CRT）可能减少PN依赖，但尚未经随机对照试验（RCT）评估。本研究评估了使用The Insides System的装置辅助CRT能否降低PN需求。方法 这项多中心、开放标签RCT纳入英国和美国12个中心因DES/ECF导致T2IF的PN依赖成人患者。排除远端肠段长度不足、近端肠梗阻、活动性脓毒症或严重肝肾衰竭者。参与者按2:1比例区组随机分配至装置辅助CRT联合标准治疗（试验组）或标准治疗（对照组）。主要终点为30天时PN热量摄入减少≥50%，采用意向性治疗分析，组间比较使用双尾p值0.025（允许单次中期分析）。次要终点包括30天和60天PN停用率、生活质量及不良事件。结果 研究纳入39名参与者（试验组26人，对照组13人）。第30天时，试验组8/26（31%）达到主要终点，对照组为0（p=0.035）。至第60天，试验组10/23（43%）完全停用PN，对照组为0（p=0.008），试验组第30天中位肠道丢失量减少1,344 mL/天（p=0.005），第60天减少1,450 mL/天（组间p=0.026）。装置相关不良事件主要为轻度；发生1例与装置无关的死亡。结论 使用The Insides System的CRT对DES/ECF所致T2IF患者显示出显著治疗优势：31%参与者30天时PN热量减少50%，>40%参与者60天时完全停用PN，且安全性可接受。试验注册：ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04577456 资助：本试验由The Insides Company Ltd.赞助。

papers.title: High-Frequency Activity for Language Mapping during Stereo-EEG: Comparison with Direct Cortical Stimulation
papers.translated_title: 立体脑电图语言定位的高频活动：与直接皮质刺激的比较
papers.author: Sagar, P.
papers.summary: Objective: Direct cortical stimulation (DCS) is the gold standard for language mapping during SEEG but is prone to false negatives and false positives that may contribute to post-operative dysphasia or else overly conservative resections. Task-induced high-frequency activity (HFA, 30-200Hz) is an emerging functional biomarker that may augment DCS, but its clinical utility remains uncertain. We aimed to quantify HFA's diagnostic concordance with DCS, assessing its potential as both a surrogate marker and a screening tool. Methods: In this single-centre prospective study, 23 adults undergoing SEEG completed language mapping with DCS and HFA. HFA was mapped using auditory and visual naming tasks (ANT/VNT), quantified via Morlet wavelet transforms with baseline-normalised z-scores. DCS-positive channels were those where 50Hz stimulation elicited language disruption. HFA distribution was examined independently of DCS. HFA-DCS concordance was assessed for individual and combined (ANT+VNT; maximal HFA across tasks) conditions at channel and sublobar levels across two thresholds: a specificity-optimized stringent threshold (Z>0.8) to examine HFA as a surrogate for DCS, and a sensitivity-optimized permissive threshold (Z>0.3) to evaluate its potential as a screening tool. Results: Twelve (52%) participants were female, and 17 (74%) were MRI-negative. HFA patterns differed by task: VNT produced greater HFA magnitude in the dominant frontal lobe (p=0.0498), while ANT produced greater magnitude and activation rate in the non-dominant temporal lobe (p=0.015; p=0.0189), highest in the non-dominant superior temporal gyrus. In the combined condition, concordance with DCS was low at the stringent threshold (channel-wise sensitivity/specificity=0.24/0.88; region-wise=0.43/0.77). Sensitivity improved at the permissive threshold (channel-wise 0.56, NPV=0.96), with region-wise sensitivity of 0.75, specificity=0.45, and NPV=0.94. Significance: Region-level HFA at a permissive threshold is useful for identifying language-negative regions and prioritising DCS testing. Poor concordance at a stringent threshold suggests HFA and DCS index distinct functional properties and are not interchangeable. Anatomically plausible HFA localisation supports the need for further multimodal validation to clarify its role in presurgical mapping.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：直接皮质电刺激（DCS）是立体脑电图（SEEG）语言定位的金标准，但易出现假阴性和假阳性，可能导致术后失语或过度保守的切除范围。任务诱导的高频活动（HFA，30-200Hz）是一种新兴的功能生物标志物，可能增强DCS，但其临床效用仍不确定。我们旨在量化HFA与DCS的诊断一致性，评估其作为替代标志物和筛查工具的潜力。方法：在这项单中心前瞻性研究中，23名接受SEEG的成人完成了DCS和HFA的语言定位。HFA通过听觉和视觉命名任务（ANT/VNT）进行定位，使用Morlet小波变换和基线归一化z值进行量化。DCS阳性通道为50Hz刺激引发语言中断的通道。HFA分布独立于DCS进行分析。在通道和亚叶水平上，针对两种阈值评估HFA-DCS一致性：特异性优化的严格阈值（Z>0.8）用于检验HFA作为DCS的替代指标，以及敏感性优化的宽松阈值（Z>0.3）用于评估其作为筛查工具的潜力。结果：12名（52%）参与者为女性，17名（74%）为MRI阴性。HFA模式因任务而异：VNT在优势额叶产生更大的HFA幅度（p=0.0498），而ANT在非优势颞叶产生更大的幅度和激活率（p=0.015；p=0.0189），在非优势颞上回最高。在联合条件下，严格阈值下与DCS的一致性较低（通道级敏感性/特异性=0.24/0.88；区域级=0.43/0.77）。宽松阈值下敏感性提高（通道级0.56，阴性预测值=0.96），区域级敏感性为0.75，特异性=0.45，阴性预测值=0.94。意义：宽松阈值下的区域级HFA有助于识别语言阴性区域并优先进行DCS测试。严格阈值下的一致性较差表明HFA和DCS反映不同的功能特性，不可互换。解剖学上合理的HFA定位支持进一步多模态验证的必要性，以阐明其在术前定位中的作用。

papers.title: Health phenome of Parkinson's patients reveals prominent mood-sleep cluster
papers.translated_title: 帕金森病患者的健康表型揭示突出的情绪-睡眠簇
papers.author: Olsen, A. L.
papers.summary: Introduction: Parkinson's disease (PD) patients have multiple co-morbidities, exposures, and medications. Our objective is to evaluate the complexity of features associated with PD in a study of 933 cases and 291 controls in the Harvard Biomarkers Study. Methods: The primary analysis evaluated 64 health features for associations with PD using logistic regression adjusting for age and sex. We adjusted for multiple testing using the false discovery rate (FDR) with FDR less than or equal to 0.05 indicating statistical significance. Exploratory analyses examined feature correlation clusters. Results: Depression (OR = 3.11, 95% CI 2.1 to 4.71), anxiety (OR = 3.31, 95% CI 2.01-5.75), sleep apnea (OR 2.58, 95% CI 1.47-4.92), and restless leg syndrome (RLS; OR 4.12, 95% CI 1.81-12.1) were more common in patients with Parkinson's than in controls. The prevalence of depression, anxiety, sleep apnea, and RLS were correlated, and these diseases formed part of a larger cluster of mood and sleep traits linked to PD. Exposures to pesticides (OR 1.87, 95% CI 1.37-2.6), head trauma (OR 2.33, 95% CI 1.51-3.73), and smoking (OR 0.57, 95% CI 0.43-0.75) were also significantly associated with PD. Vitamin D3 (OR 2.18, 95% CI 1.4-3.45) and coenzyme Q10 use (OR 2.98, 95% CI 1.89-4.92) was more common in PD. Cumulatively, 43% of PD patients had at least one psychiatric or sleep disorder, compared to 21% of controls. Conclusions: 43% of PD patients in an academic medical center have depression, anxiety, or disordered sleep. This syndromic cluster of mood and sleep traits may be pathophysiologically linked and clinically important.
papers.translated_summary: 引言：帕金森病（PD）患者常伴有多种合并症、暴露因素及用药情况。本研究基于哈佛生物标志物研究中的933例病例和291例对照，旨在评估帕金森病相关特征的复杂性。方法：主要分析采用逻辑回归模型（校正年龄和性别），评估64项健康特征与帕金森病的关联性。通过错误发现率（FDR）进行多重检验校正，以FDR≤0.05为统计学显著性标准。探索性分析考察了特征相关性聚类。结果：抑郁症（OR=3.11，95%CI 2.1-4.71）、焦虑症（OR=3.31，95%CI 2.01-5.75）、睡眠呼吸暂停（OR=2.58，95%CI 1.47-4.92）及不宁腿综合征（RLS；OR=4.12，95%CI 1.81-12.1）在帕金森病患者中的发生率显著高于对照组。抑郁症、焦虑症、睡眠呼吸暂停与不宁腿综合征的患病率存在相关性，这些疾病共同构成与帕金森病相关的情感和睡眠特征大聚类。农药暴露（OR=1.87，95%CI 1.37-2.6）、头部创伤（OR=2.33，95%CI 1.51-3.73）及吸烟（OR=0.57，95%CI 0.43-0.75）亦与帕金森病显著相关。维生素D3（OR=2.18，95%CI 1.4-3.45）和辅酶Q10（OR=2.98，95%CI 1.89-4.92）的使用在帕金森病患者中更为常见。累计数据显示，43%的帕金森病患者至少存在一种精神或睡眠障碍，而对照组该比例为21%。结论：在学术医疗中心中，43%的帕金森病患者伴有抑郁症、焦虑症或睡眠障碍。这种情感与睡眠特征的症状群可能在病理生理上存在关联，并具有重要临床意义。

papers.title: 7 Tesla MRI links poorer cognitive function to higher perivascular space burden in neuroPASC
papers.translated_title: 7特斯拉MRI显示，神经PASC中较差的认知功能与更高的血管周围间隙负担相关。
papers.author: Herb, M. T.
papers.summary: Purpose: Post-acute sequalae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) are associated with persistent neurological symptoms (neuroPASC). Perivascular spaces (PVS) in the brain may enlarge in the context of inflammation and vascular dysfunction, reflecting impaired glymphatic clearance, and have been linked to cognitive decline. SARS-CoV-2 may disrupt the blood-brain barrier and impair glymphatic function, contributing to PVS burden. This study used 7 Tesla MRI to segment and quantify PVS in neuroPASC participants and uninfected comparators and examined associations with cognitive performance. Methods: Participants (35 neuroPASC and 33 comparators) underwent a 7 Tesla MRI scan. White matter masks of the whole brain and four lobes were segmented, and semi-automated segmentation was used to quantify PVS count and volume. All participants completed cognitive testing including Trails A and B sequencing tasks; neuroPASC participants also self-reported brain fog, fatigue, anxiety, and depression. PVS count, PVS volume, and total white matter volume (WMV) between groups were compared and associations between PVS metrics and cognitive function were assessed controlling for age, sex, and intracranial volume and corrected for multiple comparisons. Results: : Among neuroPASC participants, those reporting anxiety (p =0.009) and depression (p =0.01) had higher WMV than those without. Greater PVS burden was associated with worse cognitive performance in PASC, particularly processing speed (Trails A) and executive function (Trails B). Specifically, processing speed was negatively associated with whole-brain PVS count (p-FDR = 0.008, R2 = 0.27), frontal PVS count (p-FDR = 0.03, R2 = 0.25), and frontal PVS volume (p-FDR = 0.04, R2 = 0.23). Trails B was also negatively associated with whole-brain PVS count (p-FDR = 0.005, R2 = 0.26). In comparators, higher PVS burden (volume and count) across multiple lobes was associated with worse semantic fluency (Animal Naming). There were no other significant associations between PVS measures and neuropsychiatric tests among participants within any of the subgroups to report. Conclusion: Although group-level differences in PVS were not observed, PVS burden was meaningfully negatively associated with cognitive performance in neuroPASC, with the strongest effects in frontal regions. These findings suggest that microvascular and glymphatic alterations may contribute to the characteristic processing speed and executive dysfunction seen in neuroPASC. Elevated WMV in those with anxiety and depression may reflect heightened inflammatory vulnerability. PVS may serve as a sensitive imaging marker of glymphatic dysfunction and neuroinflammation in neuroPASC, offering insight into the mechanisms underlying cognitive impairment and potential intervention targets.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：SARS-CoV-2感染后急性后遗症（PASC）与持续性神经系统症状（神经PASC）相关。脑内血管周围间隙（PVS）在炎症和血管功能障碍背景下可能扩大，反映类淋巴系统清除功能受损，并与认知功能下降相关。SARS-CoV-2可能破坏血脑屏障并损害类淋巴功能，导致PVS负荷增加。本研究采用7特斯拉MRI对神经PASC参与者和未感染对照组进行PVS分割与量化，并分析其与认知表现的关系。方法：参与者（35名神经PASC患者和33名对照组）接受7特斯拉MRI扫描。对全脑及四个脑叶的白质掩膜进行分割，采用半自动分割方法量化PVS数量和体积。所有参与者完成包含连线测试A和B序列任务的认知评估；神经PASC参与者还自我报告脑雾、疲劳、焦虑和抑郁症状。比较两组间PVS数量、体积及总白质体积（WMV），并在控制年龄、性别和颅内体积后分析PVS指标与认知功能的相关性，同时进行多重比较校正。结果：在神经PASC参与者中，报告焦虑（p=0.009）和抑郁（p=0.01）者的WMV高于无此类症状者。PVS负荷增加与PASC患者更差的认知表现相关，尤其体现在处理速度（连线测试A）和执行功能（连线测试B）。具体而言，处理速度与全脑PVS数量（p-FDR=0.008，R²=0.27）、额叶PVS数量（p-FDR=0.03，R²=0.25）及额叶PVS体积（p-FDR=0.04，R²=0.23）呈负相关。连线测试B也与全脑PVS数量呈负相关（p-FDR=0.005，R²=0.26）。在对照组中，多个脑叶的PVS负荷（体积和数量）增加与语义流畅性（动物命名）表现下降相关。各亚组参与者中未发现PVS指标与其他神经精神测试的显著关联。结论：尽管未观察到组间PVS差异，但PVS负荷与神经PASC患者的认知表现存在显著负相关，其中额叶区域效应最强。这些发现提示微血管和类淋巴系统改变可能参与神经PASC特征性处理速度和执行功能障碍的形成。焦虑和抑郁患者的WMV升高可能反映炎症易感性增强。PVS可作为神经PASC中类淋巴功能障碍和神经炎症的敏感影像标志物，为认知损伤机制及潜在干预靶点提供见解。

papers.title: Who Can Get Functional Neurological Disorder and How Do They Get It? Pathophysiological Insights from Epidemiological Data
papers.translated_title: 谁可能患上功能性神经障碍以及如何患上？来自流行病学数据的病理生理学见解
papers.author: Palmer, D. D. G.
papers.summary: Background and Objectives Functional neurological disorder (FND) is one of the most common causes of neurological symptoms and disability, but much remains unknown about its pathophysiology. In both clinical conversations and research publications, clinicians and researchers imply a variety of models for onset of the condition with respect to both the process culminating in its onset, and the distribution of susceptibility to the condition across the population. Here we used population-level data as evidence to arbitrate between these generative models of the condition. Methods We identified six hazard distributions corresponding to different pathophysiological processes, and four distributions of population susceptibility, as the assumptions underlying the range of plausible generative models resulting in the observed distribution of age of onset of FND. We combined these model families into 24 parametric proportional hazards models, and fitted each to the observed distribution of reported age at onset in two large FND datasets, one for functional movement disorders (FMD) and one for functional seizures (FS). Out-of-sample predictive accuracy for these models was compared using Bayesian model comparison. Results Strong trends were seen across model families with different distributions of population susceptibility to FND. For both datasets, the best-fitting model family overall was the mixture-cure family, which represents susceptibility as binary, with a susceptible and an unsusceptible proportion of the population. For the FMD dataset, some models in the log-normal frailty family had comparable fits to the mixture-cure models, and for the FS dataset, a number of the gamma frailty family had comparable fits. The variance parameters for each of these frailty distributions were so large as to imply binary risk, approximating mixture-cure models. Models with exponential hazard distributions--which correspond to a generative process where a single trigger in a susceptible person brings about the condition--were universally poor fits for the observed data. Other hazard distributions were insufficiently distinguished by their out-of-sample predictive accuracy to make further inference as to the underlying process resulting in onset of FND in susceptible individuals. Interpretation Our results suggest that susceptibility to FND is approximately binary, with the susceptible proportion of the population extremely likely to develop FND in their lifetime. The results also argue strongly against a generative model where a single trigger is sufficient to cause the onset of FND in a susceptible person.
papers.translated_summary: 背景与目的 功能性神经障碍（FND）是导致神经症状和残疾的最常见原因之一，但其病理生理学仍有许多未知。在临床对话和研究出版物中，临床医生和研究者暗示了多种关于该疾病发病的模型，涉及发病过程的最终阶段以及人群对该疾病的易感性分布。本研究利用人群水平数据作为证据，对这些疾病的生成模型进行评判。 方法 我们识别了六种对应于不同病理生理过程的风险分布，以及四种人群易感性分布，作为导致FND发病年龄观察分布的一系列合理生成模型的基础假设。我们将这些模型家族组合成24个参数比例风险模型，并分别拟合到两个大型FND数据集中报告的发病年龄观察分布：一个针对功能性运动障碍（FMD），另一个针对功能性癫痫发作（FS）。通过贝叶斯模型比较，评估这些模型的样本外预测准确性。 结果 在不同人群易感性分布的模型家族中，观察到显著趋势。对于两个数据集，整体拟合最佳的模型家族是混合治愈模型家族，该家族将易感性视为二元变量，即人群中存在易感人群和非易感人群。对于FMD数据集，对数正态脆弱性模型家族中的某些模型与混合治愈模型的拟合度相当；对于FS数据集，伽马脆弱性模型家族中的多个模型也具有相当的拟合度。这些脆弱性分布的方差参数大到足以暗示二元风险，近似于混合治愈模型。具有指数风险分布的模型——对应于易感个体中单一触发因素导致疾病发生的生成过程——在所有数据集中均表现出较差的拟合度。其他风险分布因其样本外预测准确性不足以区分，无法进一步推断易感个体中FND发病的潜在过程。 解释 我们的结果表明，FND的易感性近似为二元分布，人群中易感个体在其一生中极有可能发展为FND。此外，结果强烈反对一种生成模型，即单一触发因素足以导致易感个体发生FND。

papers.title: An integrated single-cell atlas of checkpoint inhibitor-induced liver injury links shared liver-tumour CD8+ T cell clones to cytotoxicity and macrophage crosstalks
papers.translated_title: 整合性单细胞图谱揭示检查点抑制剂诱导的肝损伤中共享肝脏-肿瘤CD8+ T细胞克隆与细胞毒性及巨噬细胞交互作用的关联
papers.author: Uzun, S.
papers.summary: Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) have transformed cancer therapy, but they can also induce immune-related adverse events (irAEs). Checkpoint inhibitor-induced liver injury (ChILI) is among the most frequent irAEs, yet its pathophysiology remains poorly understood. Here, we assembled a cohort of liver biopsies from cancer patients with ChILI and used a multi-modal analysis integrating single-cell spatial proteomics, bulk T cell receptor (TCR) sequencing and single-cell spatial transcriptomics to construct the first single-cell spatial atlas of ChILI. Integrating bulk and spatial TCR analyses revealed expanded T cell clones with a cytotoxic CD8+ phenotype that were shared between the liver and tumour. Intercellular communication analyses further indicated close interactions between the shared T cell clones and macrophages involving CCL5-CCR1 signalling. Our work provides in situ evidence of tumour-associated T cell contributions to ChILI. Furthermore, it establishes a framework for gaining mechanistic insights into ChILI and identifying therapeutic targets.
papers.translated_summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂（ICIs）已革新癌症治疗，但也会诱发免疫相关不良事件（irAEs）。检查点抑制剂相关肝损伤（ChILI）是最常见的irAEs之一，但其病理生理机制仍不明确。本研究收集了ChILI癌症患者的肝活检样本队列，通过整合单细胞空间蛋白质组学、批量T细胞受体（TCR）测序及单细胞空间转录组学等多模态分析，构建了首个ChILI单细胞空间图谱。整合批量与空间TCR分析发现，肝脏与肿瘤共享具有细胞毒性CD8+表型的扩增T细胞克隆。细胞间通讯分析进一步表明，共享T细胞克隆与巨噬细胞之间存在涉及CCL5-CCR1信号的密切相互作用。本研究为肿瘤相关T细胞参与ChILI提供了原位证据，并建立了深入解析ChILI机制及识别治疗靶点的研究框架。

papers.title: Full-Field Stimulus Test for Visual Function Assessment in Ultra-Low Vision with Retinitis Pigmentosa
papers.translated_title: 全视野刺激测试在视网膜色素变性超低视力患者视觉功能评估中的应用
papers.author: Yang, L.
papers.summary: Purpose: Assessing visual function in patients with ultra-low vision (ULV), particularly those with retinitis pigmentosa (RP), remains a significant challenge in therapeutic development. Full-field stimulus test (FST) provides a quantitative measure of retinal light sensitivity and may serve as a valuable clinical endpoint. We investigated FST in ULV RP by examining its associations with functional measures and daily activity-based tasks. Design: Observational, cross-sectional study. Participants: Patients with RP and visual acuity in the worse-seeing eye below counting fingers (CF) were enrolled. Methods: After dilation and 45-minute dark adaptation, FST was performed monocularly with brief full-field white-light flashes across three visits. Visual acuity was classified into four groups: no light perception (NLP), light perception (LP), hand motion (HM), and CF or better. We assessed functional vision using two tabletop object-recognition and exploration tasks, two mobility tasks, and three vision-related questionnaires. FST thresholds were compared across visual acuity groups, and associations with functional outcomes were analyzed. Main Outcome Measures: FST thresholds and their associations with functional vision outcomes. Results: Thirty-five patients (70 eyes; median age, 62 years, range 39-84) were included. Median FST thresholds (log cd{middle dot}s/m2) by visual acuity group were as follows: NLP, 1.13 (-0.63 to 2.54); LP, -0.27 (-2.70 to 2.91); HM, -1.13 (-6.24 to 0.51); CF or better, -2.82 (-5.67 to 1.73) (p < 0.001). Measurable FST thresholds were obtained in 9 of 14 NLP eyes (64.3%). FST thresholds showed significant correlations with tabletop performance (r = -0.70 to -0.46) and mobility performance (r = -0.65), whereas no significant association was observed with questionnaire scores. Test-retest variability across three visits showed no systematic bias, with a coefficient of repeatability of {+/-}0.66 to {+/-}0.82 log cd{middle dot}s/m2. ROC analyses identified FST cutoffs of -1.75 to -0.87 log cd{middle dot}s/m2 at which patients first achieved nonzero functional task performance. Conclusions: FST quantifies residual visual function in ULV RP and correlates strongly with performance-based measures of functional vision in daily life. These findings support FST as a clinically meaningful endpoint for therapeutic trials in advanced RP and other severe visual impairments and highlight the value of anchoring FST thresholds to functional task performance.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：评估超低视力（ULV）患者（尤其是视网膜色素变性（RP）患者）的视觉功能，在治疗开发中仍是一项重大挑战。全视野刺激测试（FST）可提供视网膜光敏感度的定量测量，并可能成为有价值的临床终点。我们通过检查FST与功能测量及日常活动任务的相关性，研究了ULV RP患者的FST。设计：观察性横断面研究。参与者：纳入RP患者，且较差眼视力低于数指（CF）。方法：散瞳并暗适应45分钟后，在三次访视中单眼进行短暂全视野白光闪烁的FST。视力分为四组：无光感（NLP）、光感（LP）、手动（HM）和CF或更好。我们使用两项桌面物体识别与探索任务、两项移动任务及三项视觉相关问卷评估功能视觉。比较不同视力组的FST阈值，并分析其与功能结局的相关性。主要结局指标：FST阈值及其与功能视觉结局的相关性。结果：纳入35名患者（70只眼；中位年龄62岁，范围39-84岁）。按视力组划分的中位FST阈值（log cd·s/m²）如下：NLP组1.13（-0.63至2.54）；LP组-0.27（-2.70至2.91）；HM组-1.13（-6.24至0.51）；CF或更好组-2.82（-5.67至1.73）（p<0.001）。14只NLP眼中9只（64.3%）获得可测量的FST阈值。FST阈值与桌面任务表现（r=-0.70至-0.46）及移动任务表现（r=-0.65）显著相关，而与问卷评分无显著关联。三次访视的测试-重测变异性无系统偏差，重复性系数为±0.66至±0.82 log cd·s/m²。ROC分析确定了FST截断值为-1.75至-0.87 log cd·s/m²，此时患者首次实现非零功能任务表现。结论：FST可量化ULV RP患者的残余视觉功能，并与日常生活中基于表现的功能视觉测量高度相关。这些发现支持FST作为晚期RP及其他严重视力障碍治疗试验的临床有意义终点，并强调了将FST阈值锚定于功能任务表现的价值。
